programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has a customer who is looking to restore a 1942 Ford truck that saw some action in WWII; Roli and Ryan look at a '71 Duster; Danny gets a 1974 Bronco that isn't all he thought it would be.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The shop is restoring a 1942 Ford truck; Danny and Ryan look at a 1929 Ford Roadster; Gary pulls one over on Mike in the paint shop; Danny finds a Corvette and Firebird that might be for sale.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: 1776 Gold Rare Coin
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: 1776 Gold Rare Coin
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Inspired by the Rat Rods at a local shop, Danny sends the guys out to locate parts for a Count's Kustoms Rat Rod; while on the hunt, Danny gets preoccupied by a beauty of a Bel Air and finds himself on the other side of the bargaining table.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin and the team get together to make something special for Danny; Danny runs into an old pal and his 1959 Corvette gasser.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has to give up his prized 1972 Monte Carlo for one of his biggest clients, and is counting on his team finish the job done in one week; Ryan and Mike go for the ride of their lives in a 1965 Fastback Mustang.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny sunk a lot of time into a 1967 Ford Bronco, but to make any profit, the shop will have to turn it around quickly; a customer brings in a 1950 Harley Davidson; Danny gets a chance to go for a spin in a 1966 Corvette Sting Ray.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has a customer ready to buy the 1967 Ford Bronco he's restoring; Mike and Roli settle a score at a gun range; Danny checks out a 1980 fire truck that was a first responder at the tragic Las Vegas MGM fire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny is asked to make a commemorative bike that honors music legend Les Paul; Mike wants to impress Danny and checks out a 1940 Dodge that's for sale; Danny and Kevin look at a 1964 Galaxie.

programme.title: Iconic Silver Set
programme.desc: Secure a complete 2025 Set of the iconic Morgan and Peace Silver Dollars, struck from .999 pure silver; this set contains 2 of each coin in Mint State, Proof, and Reverse Proof 70 condition with each mintage among the lowest of the modern series.

programme.title: Iconic Silver Set
programme.desc: Secure a complete 2025 Set of the iconic Morgan and Peace Silver Dollars, struck from .999 pure silver; this set contains 2 of each coin in Mint State, Proof, and Reverse Proof 70 condition with each mintage among the lowest of the modern series.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today. With only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today. With only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers target Dave Hester on his home turf of Costa Mesa, Calif.; Darrell and Brandon go over the top; Jarrod and Brandi's discovery takes them where no bidder has gone before.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers seek bargains in the hills of Murrieta, Calif.; Dave angers the Gambler into doing something drastic; Ivy scores a locker by using brains over brawn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene and Casey return to the auctions; Dave finds a piece of board game history; Jarrod and Brandi try to get a locker; Darrell and Brandon show their moves.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon revisit the scene of their greatest triumph; Jarrod and Brandi are introduced to a "Herbmeister"; Rene and Casey land a sweet score.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers invade Rene's home turf of Oceanside, Calif.; Darrell and Brandon fight for a locker containing a piece of cinematic history; friendship is both magic and profitable for Jarrod and Brandi.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: There are roses for some and thorns for others as the buyers face off in Lake Elsinore, Calif.; Dave arrives with unanticipated optimism, but that doesn't stop him from stirring up trouble; Ivy has to pound unfamiliar pavement.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave makes his colleagues struggle when they return to his stomping grounds of Santa Ana, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi are off their game; Ivy crashes the festivities and faces new bidding rivals.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Too Many Cooks in the Locker
programme.desc: The buyers invade Ivy's home turf of Lancaster, Calif.; Mary attempts to make a deal with an unexpected ally; Jarrod and Brandi pressure their colleagues; Rene tries to prove his superiority.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders get up early to grab buys in Perris, Calif.; Dave's excessive bluster creates tension; Mary tries to stay upbeat; Ivy stays sharp and looks for a score.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary brings out a not-so-secret weapon as the gang invades North Hollywood, Calif.; Dave takes an unusual gamble; Jarrod and Brandi look for choice merchandise; Rene aims high.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave goes after Jarrod and Brandi at a first-class auction in Arcadia, Calif.; Ivy makes an early move; Mary struggles to keep up with the competition amid soaring prices.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy hopes to change his luck in Montebello, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi fight for big lockers; Dave controls his bidding but can't keep a lid on his temper.

programme.desc: Beauty-school students threaten Ponytail; an irate man claims a missing sign is to blame for his violation; Sonjia directs traffic.

programme.desc: Nosy neighbors pester Eric; a man is caught using an illegal license plate; crosswalk parkers annoy Kathy.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Lashelle tries to counsel sisters that are furious over a corner clearance violation; two men confront Johnny after they are ticketed for feeding the wrong meter, and Ponytail is all business while challenged by angry citizens.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: A furious man challenges Rodney and Michele as they try to uphold the law; citizens berate Charles even when the violations are obvious; the insults get personal when Sonjia tickets an irate violator in Detroit.
